name: ExtensionArtifactAssessment_Artifact
title: R5: The artifact assessed, commented upon or rated (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `ArtifactAssessment.artifact[x]` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`ArtifactAssessment.artifact[x]` 1..1 `canonical, Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Resource), uri`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
* R5 `ArtifactAssessment.artifact[x]` 1..1 `canonical, Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Resource), uri`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `ArtifactAssessment.artifact[x]` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `ArtifactAssessment` is not mapped.
Element `ArtifactAssessment.artifact[x]` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: The artifact assessed, commented upon or rated (new)
element.comment:
Element `ArtifactAssessment.artifact[x]` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `ArtifactAssessment` is not mapped.
Element `ArtifactAssessment.artifact[x]` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: The artifact assessed, commented upon or rated
element.definition: A reference to a resource, canonical resource, or non-FHIR resource which the comment or assessment is about.
